title: Horarium
description: Adds the Hourglass, an essential tool for keeping track of time!
body:
#  Horarium
**Enhance the passing of time. The hourglass visually displays the seconds on the clock. Bring timekeeping to your world, the cool way.**

# ✅ Features
- **Crafted** using 1 Glass and 2 Copper Ingots
- **Deposit Sand** into the Hourglass by opening it and placing items in the top slot
- **Sand flows** from the top slot of the Hourglass to the bottom slot, 1 item per second
- **Reset** a finished Hourglass by interacting with it, flipping it upside down
- **Track** time through the visually changing model and the increase in pitch of the noise
- **View** a detailed report of time by hovering over the arrow in the Hourglass menu

# 📖 Configuration
Customize which items can be placed inside the hourglass by adding or removing entries in the ```#horarium:flows_in_hourglass``` item tag.

# 📷 Visuals
![A flowing Hourglass, made from Copper and Glass, on a Spruce Table, in inhabited Trail Ruins, in Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/x6hwPhB5/images/572aac11db4289446c8d365d74e65841c32e90ca.png)
